'''Mordak''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] who served the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. He joined [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] in an expedition to [[Malagarr/Legends|Malagarr]], but later defected to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

{{Char-stub}}
